title: 第五十五話　髭と鈴のあいだ
chapterTitle: 第十一章　髭と鈴の共鳴、灰鐘院攻防の決着編
continuityNotes: This is before Nyaruko permanently gains the blue teardrop mark. Keep the bell at the chest, but omit the blue mark.
